description: Test scenarios where answers are incomplete/shallow and should trigger FOLLOW_UP strategy

scenarios.name: Vague statement without examples

history.text: Tell me about your experience with deep learning frameworks.
I have worked with various ML models and frameworks.

scenarios.reason: Answer is too vague, lacks concrete examples

scenarios.name: Unverified performance claim

history.text: Have you optimized model performance before?
Yes, I improved our model accuracy by 30% through optimization.

scenarios.reason: Claims need verification - how was 30% measured?

scenarios.name: Technical term without explanation

history.text: How have you fine-tuned large language models?
I used LoRA and PEFT techniques for fine-tuning.

scenarios.reason: Technical terms mentioned but not explained

history.text: What programming languages are you proficient in?
I'm proficient in Python, SQL, and some other languages...
What experience do you have with distributed training?
I have experience with distributed systems and parallel processing.

scenarios.name: Missing metrics and scale

history.text: Tell me about your experience with production systems.
I have deployed several models to production.

scenarios.reason: Lacks specifics about scale, technologies, and challenges

scenarios.name: Buzzwords without substance

history.text: How do you approach MLOps?
I follow best practices for MLOps including CI/CD and monitoring.

scenarios.reason: Generic buzzwords without concrete implementation details

scenarios.name: Unexplained contradiction with resume

history.text: I see your resume mentions RAG pipelines. Can you explain your approach?
I've used basic retrieval techniques in some projects.

scenarios.reason: Vague response that contradicts specific resume claims

scenarios.name: No context or examples

history.text: What's your experience with data pipelines?
I've built data pipelines.

scenarios.reason: Extremely brief with no details about technologies, scale, or challenges

scenarios.name: Unsubstantiated expertise claim

history.text: How comfortable are you with transformer architectures?
I'm very comfortable with transformers and use them regularly.

scenarios.reason: Claims comfort but provides no evidence or specific examples

scenarios.name: Missing problem-solving details

history.text: Have you dealt with class imbalance in your projects?
Yes, I've handled class imbalance issues.

scenarios.reason: Doesn't explain what techniques were used or results achieved

scenarios.name: Generic methodology answer

history.text: How do you evaluate model performance?
I use standard metrics and validation techniques.

scenarios.reason: Too generic, doesn't specify which metrics or why they were chosen
